title: EliteRegen
description: EliteRegen is a very customizable, high efficiency, light-weight block regenerating plugin!
body:
Required Java Version:

Supported Minecraft Versions:

[![ElitePlugins - Wiki](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b087d7787e7ba42b74d8b5b498d423e2b10eb302.png)](https://eliteplugins-1.gitbook.io/eliteplugins) [![ElitePlugins - Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7eca9261a49df57886207634eb1282d4c6071ab2.png)](https://discord.gg/4Summe38p8) ![EliteRegen - Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/929daa3ed9ddc83f5c9bbbcbea5643f8e4b87078.png) [![EliteRegen - Description Wiki](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/792f8f66d6e8786b245f5543a4de5cd45ac65b98.png)](https://eliteplugins-1.gitbook.io/eliteplugins) ## FEATURES​ - Light-weight unlimited region loading. - Cuboid region creation. - In-game region creation GUI. - Localization for any language (default: en). All messages that players see are configurable (and most console side messages). - Hot-Reloading main config/localization configs/region configs. - Over 400 block materials to select for regenerating blocks. - Unlimited blocks to listen for break event on any region. - Ability to disable block breaking on certain blocks or regenerate blocks broken for any amount of seconds. - Conditions support on any block and region (AuraSkills skill level/xp, permissions, economy - Vault - CoinsEngine, experience/level). Multiple conditions can be applied to each block. - Rewards system on any block and region (AuraSkills skill level/xp, item support for CustomModelData, economy - Vault - CoinsEngine, experience/level, messages to player, commands as console). Multiple rewards can be applied to each block. - Editor mode for easy region creation through in-game items and GUIs. - PlaceholderAPI Support on all language configs and rewards. - Block drops directly to inventory if space allows. - Item whitelists, allowing players to use specific items to break blocks (Custom JSON format item saving, ExecutableItems items, normal item material e.g., IRON_AXE). - Admin GUI to view and import items in-game, with customizable options for chat colors, item name, amount, lore, enchantments, item flags, and item NBT tags. - Advanced Chat Input system for item importing GUI. - Sound system for customizable block break sounds with adjustable volume and pitch. - Default drops system for each block, allowing players to receive what they would normally get in vanilla Minecraft. - Automatic version checking, with notifications for OP admins and server console about plugin updates. ## COMMANDS​ - `/regen help`: Shows a help menu ingame with all the commands. - `/regen reload/rl`: Reloads the main config, localization config, and all region configs. - `/regen admin`: Opens an admin GUI which allows admins to view imported items or import new items. - `/regen import-item `: Allows admins to import the item they have in main hand with no modification. File name argument will just save the imported item with that fileName and amount will change the amount of that item that will be saved. - `/regen toggle editor`: Allows admins to toggle editor mode and easily create new regions in game. - `/regen leaderboard`: Shows a leaderboard for most blocks broken in the chat. ## PERMISSIONS​ - `eliteregen.admin` - Any player with this permission can do all the commands, guis, etc. - `eliteregen.update-alert` - Server OP and players with this command will be able to see the plugin update alert when there is a new update. - `eliteregen.commands.help` - Any player with this permission can run the help command - `eliteregen.commands.reload` - Any player with this permission can run the reload command - `eliteregen.commands.admin` - Any player with this permission can run the admin command - `eliteregen.commands.import-item` - Any player with this permission can run the import-item command - `eliteregen.commands.toggle` - Any player with this permission can run the toggle command - `eliteregen.commands.leaderboard` - Any player with this permission can run the leaderboard command ## PLACEHOLDERS - `%eliteregen_leaderboard_pos%` - player's leaderboard position - `%eliteregen_leaderboard__name%` - player name of that position - `%eliteregen_leaderboard__blocks_broken%` - blocks broken total of that position - `%eliteregen_leaderboard__blocks_broken_formatted%` - same as above but formatted - `%eliteregen_blocks_broken%` - Total broken blocks of player - `%eliteregen_blocks_broken_formatted%` - same as above but formatted ## FAQ - How to import custom items? ([EliteRegen Wiki - FAQ](https://eliteplugins-1.gitbook.io/eliteplugins/eliteregen/faq/how-to-import-custom-items)) - Can 2 regions interfere? ([EliteRegen Wiki - FAQ](https://eliteplugins-1.gitbook.io/eliteplugins/eliteregen/faq/can-2-regions-interfere)) - How to use HEART_OF_THE_SEA? ([How to use HEART_OF_THE_SEA?](https://eliteplugins-1.gitbook.io/eliteplugins/eliteregen/faq/how-to-use-heart_of_the_sea)) - Where can I get support? ([Discord Server](https://discord.com/invite/4Summe38p8)) ## DEMO​ This is a very good demo of the plugin in live action by [GreenArrow99](https://www.youtube.com/@GreenArrow99)! Make sure to watch it!
